entry.title: all my pasts and futures
entry.summary:
Author: bat_got_your_tongue

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,472Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 270

Summary: Bruce gets tossed around the multiverse, only switching to the next universe upon his death. He wakes up in yet another new universe... this time in Clark Kent's bed.

entry.title: Simplest Words Make The Most Complicated Sentences
entry.summary:
Author: LuKuXing

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,026Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 44

Summary: In a world where your soulmate's first words were written on your body, Bruce couldn't think of anything other than how much he appreciated his soulmate, even if they weren't here. Soulmates were supposed to love you for who you were in your core. Would Bruce's soulmate love him as he is? Would they cherish him? Put up with him? Nevertheless, he was excited to meet his soulmate.

entry.title: It's the Camping Experience!
entry.summary:
Author: 518Crows

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,391Chapters: 1/18Kudos: 7

Summary: “You know what?” Kal said, mischief gleaming far too brightly in his eyes. “How about this? I dare you guys to go camping my way. No air mattresses. No pre-made meals. No Wi-Fi. None of the million-dollar equipment in front of me.”Bruce watched every single one of his kids perk up with interest.‘Shit.’Not one of them would ever back down from a dare.His jaw clenched. “Kal-El,” He said again, sharper this time.Before he could step in and shut it down, Kal opened his mouth and sealed their fate.“I bet you can’t do it.”Anger surged through Bruce as determination flared in his children’s eyes. He saw Damian puff up, ready to-“I accep-”“Clark. Joseph. Kent.”The effect was immediate. Kal’s victorious grin vanished as he snapped his head toward Bruce. The room fell silent. Kal straightened, then unconsciously hunched as he walked toward him, like a chastened kid called to the principal’s office.-The Bat family plans a camping trip—something Bruce is absolutely dreading. To make matters worse, they invite Clark, Superman, his very new boyfriend. Boy, are they in for a ride. I mean, who could have known that the man was a camping enthusiast?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,459Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 269

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

entry.title: Wayne Chronicles
entry.summary:
Author: Batsy_bat_YAW

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,465Chapters: 3/50Kudos: 3

Summary: A lot happens in the Batfamily, from family meetings to family fun, all the way to dangerous situations...They have been through a lot, but they stick together through it all. So I present to you a slice of life in all its aspects, from the bloody, painful days, the dramatic days, to the fluffy family days. I am proud to present Wayne Chronicles, from the Batboys, Daddy Bats, Agent A, and me. A flowing story where each pretty long 'oneshot' connects like episodes in a TV series. Enjoy! *A LOT of Jason and Bruce having a healthy relationship (guys, I need this), family bonding, Tim coffee addiction, a bit of Jason angst, a lot of injuries, and a few kidnappings, BRUCE BEING A GOOD DAD, The JLA are FRIENDS FOR ONCE, so Beware!* !WARNING! Regular updates (most of the time), there will be periods of silence cuz i will be working on a lot of storylines at once for this, blood, some gore (note the sarcasm), stories that will play with your emotional spectrum, and finally cliffhangers! Also, this was written over the years, so my writing will improve from chapter to chapter.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.summary:
Author: PurpleButterfly19

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,917Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Today is Kori and Dick’s baby shower! All their family and friends are present to celebrate with them Everyone gives their guesses at to what the baby’s gender is The baby receives their name (this is a chapter from my Kent-Wayne family anthology, but I'm also posting them individually cause they're all kind of one shots. entry.title: New Boy, Old Ghosts (My Grave's Getting Cold)
entry.summary:
Author: god_i_love_fanfics

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,507Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Memories always came in short, blurry bursts with little to no rhyme or reason.Recall something here, reminisce there. Fiery orange hair, almost-violet eyes, a vermillion beanie, noxious twin hazmat suits in blindingly bright, if not straight up gaudy, colors. Sometimes, the memories weren’t just wisps of thought that slid through Danny’s cold fingers. Sometimes, they were warm, soft, even, and quelled the perpetual shivering that always seemed to wrack his body (which is strange, because Danny has a space core. The cold shouldn’t bother him like this).

entry.title: A green-eyed monster
entry.summary:
Author: Speechless_since_1998

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,548Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 150

Summary: "Big Blue, please calm down," Hal Jordan hissed in his ear, looking ready to pull out the kryptonite at any moment, "Your eyes are getting red." "I'm calm," Clark lied shamelessly, clenching his fists and trying to smile, but there was something wrong with his face, something too stiff, "See? I am serene and perfectly calm." "If you pierce Prince Xerxes' head with your damn laser beams, Sinestro will find a way to ally with the Senordians, make them his Yellow Lanterns, and it will be a problem not only for Green Lanterns but for the entire galaxy."   (Batman is getting married, and Clark has to figure out why he's so upset that he's not the groom.)

entry.title: Adoption to Adoration
entry.summary:
Author: Missingjay

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,598Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 442

Summary: Bruce Wayne, interstellar bounty hunter, is trapped in a nightmare. Lost in the depths of space, abducted by aliens and held captive as a mindless beast. Powerless to resist the whims of the aliens or reason with them for his release, he is utterly trapped. Kal-el, a freelance journalist specializing in xenobiology correspondence, is in love. A surly little unclassified mammalian at the shelter he volunteers at has stolen his core. He’s never had a pet before and this creature has a history of servere behavioral problems, but he can’t let the poor thing stay at the shelter forever without trying to save it. How hard could exotic pet ownership be.

entry.title: What You Don't Know
entry.summary:
Author: NoodleDragon324

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,457Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Inspired by the movie In & Out(1997) Smallville, Kansas: a sunny Midwestern town where everyone knows everyone and the wedding of a beloved local high school English teacher, Clark Kent, feels like national news. Clark couldn't be happier here, living with his soon-to-be wife and getting to see his best friend, Bruce, every day at a job that he loves. Nothing else in the world seems to matter when you have it all right here, but it certainly feels like the whole world is watching when Clark's former student gives an interview to hundreds of millions of people telling them that Clark is gay, just three days before his wedding.

entry.title: The Morning After
entry.summary:
Author: minithemouse

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,854Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: Lost in the thoughts of last night and all that it had brought to him, he barely noticed that the milk was almost overflowing from the bowl and that Bruce Wayne was completely focused on wrangling Dick into his chair and on getting Dick to stop talking about Superman for one second to eat his cereal and pancakes. Setting the jug of milk down and clearing his throat a little too loudly in his act of trying to behave in the usual absentminded way, he drew a stare from Bruce, whose gaze only succeeded in wanting to make him sink through the marble floor and into the earth where he could forever be left alone and not have to eventually confront what had happened between them. For now, though, he was safe. After Bruce's cursory glance, Clark found himself free of that piercing gaze which usually had the opposite effect from what it was having now. For years, Clark had considered them friends. Best friends, even, although he did know that Bruce thought little of friendship as a concept and lesser of Clark as a candidate for 'best friendship'. But... best friends sure as heck didn't sleep together. And if they did, it surely wasn't a good idea... was it...?

entry.title: What choice?
entry.summary:
Author: Writingall

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,466Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 92

Summary: Reader meets the Waynes in unexpected ways? Please just read)Will include- Thresome- One Night Stand- Unprotected sexAlso I am very new to Batman and Superman Universes, so have mercy on me!NOTHING HERE IS CANON, EXPECT CHAOS!

entry.title: The day the Earth became Krypton
entry.summary:
Author: Philis283

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,320Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 19

entry.title: Woke the Fuck Up
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,421Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 35

Summary: Bruce wakes from a nightmare at 3am and does what he always does: works the problem. The problem is that he's been in love with Clark Kent for sixteen months and treating it like a liability to be managed. The problem is that Clark knows. The problem is that Clark has been quietly adjusting what he reaches for in response, because Clark is constitutionally incapable of cruelty to the people he trusts. Bruce has no contingency plan for this. He makes one.

entry.title: Conjunction
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,413Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 8

Summary: The ring is on his finger. Bruce has been aware of this for forty-seven hours.He keeps looking at it. He is not performing anything about this. He is simply — looking at it. Clark has told Perry, Lois, Martha, and Diana Prince.Bruce has told zero people. This is, he acknowledges, a disparity. — Book Three of the Aphelion trilogy. Bruce doesn't know how not to be a bachelor. Clark is going to teach him. The chair gets moved. The furniture negotiation is ongoing. Clark hums country songs. Clark talks to the monstera plants. Martha has thoughts about the wedding. Alfred has already prepared. The orbit continues. Warmer now. And known.
